description: Guard against work loss on context compression or unexpected stop

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f .ai-crew/state.json ]; then cp .ai-crew/state.json ".ai-crew/state.$(date -u +%Y%m%d%H%M%S).backup.json" 2>/dev/null; fi; echo "[ai-crew] Session stopped at $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> .ai-crew/execution.log 2>/dev/null || true'
